import io
import string

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = x % y
    x = y
    y = t
  end
  x
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut first = ""
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      i = n
    else
      first = "#{first}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  mut j = 0
  mut started = false
  mut split_at = 0
  while j < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if not started
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        j = j + 1
      else
        started = true
        split_at = j
        j = n
      end
    else
      j = j + 1
    end
  end
  mut k = split_at
  mut second = ""
  while k < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, k)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      k = n
    else
      second = "#{second}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      k = k + 1
    end
  end
  let a = match string.parse_int(first)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let b2 = match string.parse_int(second)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let g = gcd(a, b2)
  println("gcd=#{g}")
end
